properties.Name: Ortaköy
properties.Note: Could be Ortaköy, Orhangazi (which appears on missionary maps and is mentioned in the missionary herald)

properties.Name: Bayuk
properties.Note: Options: Barak (Nüzhetiye), Batak (Yeşilova), Beşik (Beşiktepe),

properties.Name: Pangorah
properties.Note: Closest sounding village in the region is Palanga

properties.Name: Stanirol
properties.Note: No reference in the archives. Alan quotes it as one of the outstations in her book

properties.Name: Koordbeleng
properties.Note: Village does not exist today

properties.Name: Norkeni
properties.Note: Annual Report records this as Yenikeny.  Most likely Nor Küğ (Yeniköy)

properties.Name: Tamluk
properties.Note: Conflicting info regarding location.  Academic article says Tamluk is İhsaniye whereas Kevorkian says Tamlık is Damlık

properties.Name: Çakmak
properties.Note: Two Çakmaks in the region.  One in Ordu and one in Tokat

properties.Name: Gümüş
properties.Note: Double check the mergin of the village

properties.Name: Kestenegiriş
properties.Note: found in R. Kevorkian. No reference otherwise

properties.Name: Yagh-bassan
properties.Note: Several Yağbasans in the region.  Selected the one in Samsun based on annual report description ("a greek village, on the spur of the same mountains (as Kapıkaya)")

properties.Name: Gülköy
properties.Note: Gülköy vs Gölköy

properties.Name: Semen
properties.Note: close to Aksu Village, Giresun. Location might not be fully accurate

properties.Name: Heslu
properties.Note: Probably Kazlu. Name Haslou dissapears in 1870.

properties.Name: Kozlu
properties.Note: Haslou, Kozloo in microfilm. Two Kozloos in the Hinis region. Selected Ovakozlu because of Missionary Herard archives stating Kozloo was a neighbouring village to Haramik

properties.Name: Şane
properties.Note: Could be Çınarlı, Trabzon - used to be called BüyükŞana or Siana

properties.Name: Ainetsik
properties.Note: The Armenian population lived in Verin (upper) Aghntsik, while the Muslim population resided in Varin (lower) Aghntsik.

properties.Name: Bakır Maden
properties.Note: Educated guess given copper mines

properties.Name: Bizmuşen
properties.Note: Two Bizmuşen's in the region.  Most likely the one Harput Kaza given 7km distance and W.S.W. direction.

properties.Name: Dzuğ
properties.Note: Listed as Dzuğ.  More likely Dzak as indicated in Barnum archives.  48 miles NNW

properties.Name: Hah
properties.Note: At first the name corresponded to a village in the Kaza of Dersim.  On second inspection of the archives it is more likely to be Khokh (noted as being 15 miles SSE of Harput). Barnum spells it as Hoh.  Furthermore two Hohs existed. I picked the one with

properties.Name: Hemşerik
properties.Note: Listed as Hemşerik in some sources (i.e. Alan).  A list by Barnum from the archives spells it as Heusenik (noting it is 1.5 miles SE of Harpoot).  Equates to current day Ulukent

properties.Name: Hooeli
properties.Note: Educated guess

properties.Name: İmran
properties.Note: Recorded as İmran in Alan. More likely Temran as recorded by Barnum. Given that it is 98 miles NE of Harput.

properties.Name: İsmetli
properties.Note: Recorded as İsmetli in Alan.  More likely İsmailli village based on archive descriptions - 42 miles North East of Harput

properties.Name: Megire
properties.Note: Listed only as Megire in Alan. Archives show that Agh Mezre was an outpost.

properties.Name: Nurköy
properties.Note: Several Nurköys in the region. Selected this based on description in archives, 34 miles East of Harput.

properties.Name: Prayne
properties.Note: Recorded as Prayne by Alan.  No village of this name in the region. Pashavank is a village listed as an outstation that is missing. Substituted with this.

properties.Name: Vank
properties.Note: Another Vank in Arapkir Kaza

properties.Name: Yil
properties.Note: no record of this in archives. İnstead Turkhi

properties.Name: Zeroh
properties.Note: Outside Ağrı. Bit too far?

properties.Name: Garmen
properties.Note: Garni based on map found in ABC 16.9.7 Reel 677. Shows that "Garmen" is just north of Mush

properties.Name: Tsogank
properties.Note: Many villages with the same sounding name

properties.Name: Çarmuk
properties.Note: Recorded as Çaruk.  More likely Çermik given that the city was an Armenian center and mentioned in the MH.

properties.Name: Kalaat
properties.Note: This entry also recorded as Kalu'ut el Murra (Kalaat el Mürra). It is likely Kulleth above

properties.Name: Garmen
properties.Note: Garni based on map found in ABC 16.9.7 Reel 677. Shows that "Garmen" is just north of Mush

properties.Name: Harkum
properties.Note: Also Khorkom (Dilkaya)

properties.Name: Maşgudah
properties.Note: unsure

properties.Name: Pertek
properties.Note: multiple Perteks

properties.Name: Hamidiye
properties.Note: other Hamidiyes exist, perhaps Ceyhan, Adana
